mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM posts
deleted_at IS NULL
AND tag = #{tag}
AND ( LOWER(title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) OR LOWER(body) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) )
ORDER BY votes DESC
ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE comments.post_id = posts.id ) DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{skip}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts
deleted_at IS NULL
AND tag = #{tag}
AND ( LOWER(title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) OR LOWER(body) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')) )
SELECT * FROM posts ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{skip}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (title, body, author, tag) VALUES (#{title}, #{body}, #{author}, #{tag})
